items.title: Supreme Court rules the Postal Service can't be sued, even when mail is intentionally not delivered
items.description: A divided Supreme Court has ruled that Americans can’t sue the U.S. Postal Service, even when employees deliberately refuse to deliver mail

US consumer confidence improves modestly in February after cratering the first month of 2026
items.description: The American consumer’s confidence in the U.S. economy improved slightly in February after cratering a month earlier
